allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/obsidian-md-to-jira" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Out-File page.html -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Content page.html | Select-String -Pattern "risk|warning|scorecard|practice|health|review" -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 30\))
PowerShell($c = Get-Content page.html -Raw; $idx = $c.IndexOf\('scorecard'\); if \($idx -gt -1\) { $c.Substring\($idx, [Math]::Min\(15000, $c.Length - $idx\)\) } else { "no scorecard found" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/obsidian-md-to-jira/scorecard" -UserAgent "Mozilla/5.0" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Out-File scorecard.html -Encoding utf8; \(Get-Item scorecard.html\).Length)
